---
title: "ISI-BUDS Summer 2026 Schedule"
subtitle: "June 22rd - July 31" 
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: Schedule
    css: style.css
    embed-resources: true
    link-external-newwindow: true
    number-sections: false
editor: source
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
library(fontawesome)
```

![](images/ISI-Buds-homepage-graphicv1.png){width="100%"}

The program meets daily from 9 am - 3:30 pm in DBH 2011, unless otherwise specified.
Lunch will be from noon to 1pm.

Make sure to join our **Slack workspace**, you should have received an email.
You may want to download the Slack app because we will be using this for communication throughout the program.
Make sure notifications are on.

## Day 1 - June 22, 2026

| Topic | Material |
|:-----------------------|:-----------------------|
| Tech Setup | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day01-prerequisites/1-setup/1-setup.html){target="_blank"} |
| Introduction to Toolkit | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day01-prerequisites/2-intro-toolkit/2-intro-toolkit.html){target="_blank"} |
| Lab (Intro Coding) | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day01-prerequisites/lab/day01-intro-coding.html){target="_blank"} |
| Lab (Quarto) | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day01-prerequisites/lab/day01-quarto.html){target="_blank"} |

## Day 2 - June 23, 2026

| Topic | Material |
|:-----------------------|:-----------------------|

## Day 3 - June 24, 2026

| Topic | Material |
|:-----------------------|:-----------------------|

## Day 4 - June 25, 2026

| Topic | Material |
|:-----------------------|:-----------------------|

## Day 5 - June 26, 2026

| Topic | Material |
|:-----------------------|:-----------------------|
